options.blogdescription: Where great design is brought back to life.

steps.code:
'Case Files', 'post_name' => 'workshop-checklist', 'post_status' => 'publish', 'post_type' => 'page', 'post_content' => '', )); $c = '

The Design Morgue — Case Files

'; $c .= '

Five specimens. Five preventable deaths. Examine each exhibit, diagnose the crime, and attempt resuscitation. You are the forensic designer now.

'; $c .= '
'; $c .= '

Exhibit A — The Mutilated Logo

'; $c .= '

Cause of death: Excessive whitespace around the logo mark. The brand drowns in its own canvas. Nobody sees the name — they see emptiness.

'; $c .= ''; $c .= ''; $c .= '

Your task: Go to Appearance → Editor → Header. The header already uses the uncropped version. Replace the site logo with the properly cropped version from the Media Library (search for "Cropped"). Compare how the header feels before and after.

'; $c .= '
'; $c .= '

Exhibit B — The Accent Color Massacre

'; $c .= '

Cause of death: Everything is highlighted. When every element screams for attention, nothing gets it. The eye has nowhere to land.

'; $c .= '

Your task: Open the home page in the Site Editor. Count how many buttons and headings share the same red accent. Remove the accent from all but the single most important call-to-action. Save and compare.

'; $c .= '
'; $c .= '

Exhibit C — The Pale Witness

'; $c .= '

Cause of death: A low-resolution image used at full width. The pixels are visible. The brand looks cheap.

'; $c .= '

Your task: On the home page in the Site Editor, find the full-width featured image. Replace it with the high-resolution version from the Media Library (search for "HD"). Notice the difference in perceived quality and brand credibility.

'; $c .= '
'; $c .= '

Exhibit D — The Void

'; $c .= '

Cause of death: No breathing room. Text and elements are compressed together, creating visual claustrophobia. The layout communicates panic, not elegance.

'; $c .= '

Your task: On the home page in the Site Editor, find the hero section and the bottom CTA. Both have almost no padding. Add at least 60px top and bottom padding to each. Save and compare. Notice how space communicates confidence.

'; $c .= '
'; $c .= '

Exhibit E — The Palette Paradox

'; $c .= '

Cause of death: The wrong background for the content type. Dark backgrounds reduce eye strain in long reading sessions. White backgrounds aid legibility for text-heavy layouts. Neither is wrong — but they are not interchangeable.

'; $c .= '

Your task: Open the Styles panel in the Site Editor (the half-circle icon, top right). Switch the background color from light to dark. Review the home page. Does the content suit the dark treatment? Switch back and note which palette this brand actually needs — and why.

'; $c .= '
'; $c .= '

Your Conclusions

'; $c .= '

Close the tab when you are done. The morgue does not keep records — only lessons.

'; wp_update_post(array('ID' => $cid, 'post_content' => $c)); // --- Home page with deliberate design crimes --- $hid = wp_insert_post(array( 'post_title' => 'Home', 'post_name' => 'home', 'post_status' => 'publish', 'post_type' => 'page', 'post_content' => '', )); // Hero group — cramped padding (Exhibit D), 3 same-color buttons (Exhibit B) $h = ''; $h .= '
'; $h .= '

Transform Your Brand

'; $h .= '

We revive dying brands. Schedule a consultation and begin the recovery.

'; $h .= '
'; $h .= '
Book Now
'; $h .= '
See Portfolio
'; $h .= '
Contact Us
'; $h .= '
'; $h .= '
'; // Services columns — all headings and buttons in accent color (Exhibit B continues) $h .= ''; $h .= '
'; $h .= '

Our Services

'; $h .= '
'; $h .= '
'; $h .= '

Brand Identity

'; $h .= '

Full brand overhaul from logo to typography system.

'; $h .= '
Learn More
'; $h .= '
'; $h .= '
'; $h .= '

Web Design

'; $h .= '

Pixel-perfect layouts built for conversion and clarity.

'; $h .= '
Learn More
'; $h .= '
'; $h .= '
'; $h .= '

Photography

'; $h .= '

Art direction and product photography for digital use.

'; $h .= '
Learn More
'; $h .= '
'; $h .= '
'; $h .= '
'; // Full-width low-res image (Exhibit C) $h .= ''; $h .= ''; // CTA — cramped padding (Exhibit D), accent heading + accent button (Exhibit B) $h .= ''; $h .= '
'; $h .= '

Ready to Begin?

'; $h .= '

Our team is standing by. Contact us before the damage becomes permanent.

'; $h .= '
'; $h .= '
Get Started Today
'; $h .= '
'; $h .= '
'; wp_update_post(array('ID' => $hid, 'post_content' => $h)); // Set home page as front page update_option('show_on_front', 'page'); update_option('page_on_front', $hid); // Register images in media library $base = WP_CONTENT_DIR . '/uploads/'; $images = array( array('logo-cropped.png', 'VITAL Logo (Cropped)', 'image/png'), array('logo-uncropped.jpg', 'VITAL Logo (Uncropped — specimen)', 'image/jpeg'), array('specimen-lowres.jpg', 'VITAL Campaign Shot', 'image/jpeg'), array('specimen-hires.jpg', 'VITAL Campaign Shot HD', 'image/jpeg'), array('banner.jpg', 'Design Morgue Workshop Banner', 'image/jpeg'), ); foreach ($images as $img) { wp_insert_attachment(array( 'post_title' => $img[1], 'post_mime_type' => $img[2], 'post_status' => 'inherit', ), $base . $img[0], 0); } echo 'done';
